opinion.h4: CROWN ZELLERBACH CORP. v. WASHINGTON. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF WASHINGTON. No. 805. Decided May 25, 1959.
opinion.p: John J. O'Connell, Attorney General of Washington, and John W. Riley, Assistant Attorney General, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
MR. JUSTICE FRANKFURTER and MR. JUSTICE CLARK took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
